normalization.notes: Store modern Bengali-script text in NFC and preserve original reviewed forms. Do not strip vowel signs, hasanta, anusvara, candrabindu, nukta, or Assamese-specific letters such as ৰ and ৱ during analysis.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: consonant bases, independent vowels, dependent vowel signs, inherent vowel, hasanta, common conjuncts, nasal signs, nukta, and Assamese-specific letter notes
segmentation.notes: Bengali and Assamese use whitespace for coarse words but need akshara-aware review for teaching. Bengali is the v1 content boundary; Assamese forms are documented as notes rather than mixed into early anchors.
